title: Funerals
content:
There was an old man in a hearse,
     Who murmured, "This might have been worse;
        Of course the expense
        Is simply immense,
     But it doesn't come out of my purse."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Funerals", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
